creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Luca Pizzamiglio from comment #1)

<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2021-November/000970.html> noted with thanks. 

I'm happy for this bug to be closed.

----

dvl would you like to continue in the FreshPorts area? 

<https://github.com/FreshPorts/freshports/issues/287> was memorable, however until now I was not aware that specifying an origin can cause pkg to install multiple flavours.
